allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} projeto\(s\):'\); [print\(f'  - {p[\\"name\\"]:30s}  ref={p[\\"id\\"]:20s}  region={p.get\(\\"region\\",\\"?\\"\)}  status={p.get\(\\"status\\",\\"?\\"\)}  created={p.get\(\\"created_at\\",\\"\\"\)[:10]}'\) for p in data]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('  rows: ', d if isinstance\(d,\(list,dict\)\) else 'erro'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('  password_hibp_enabled:', d.get\('password_hibp_enabled'\)\)")
